title: goniophlebium reinwardtianum
intro: Goniophlebium reinwardtianum, also known as the Reinecke's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antiviral properties.
